codex_response:
Implemented `e7dd8335` in [__init__.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e7dd8335/__init__.py), [verifier.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e7dd8335/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/aaaaa/projects/codex_batch/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_e7dd8335/generator.py#L4). The rule is: find each 8-connected `1`-shape and recolor only the cells strictly below that shape’s vertical midpoint to `2`. I used the summary hint because it matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` correction was needed.

The generator stays on-family by sampling black-background blue wireframe shapes in three motifs seen in the task family: rectangular frames, capped pillar forms, and diagonal zigzag/hex outlines, then deriving the output by recoloring each shape’s lower half. No new shared primitive was needed.

Validation passed end-to-end: official examples `4/4`, build produced `1000` verified examples, and `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task e7dd8335` passed `1000/1000`.
